name: The Scarlet Atelier
description: A world of endless manicured estates and aristocratic hunting grounds, where biotechnology and selective breeding have produced a landscape of lethal beauty. Massive hedge-mazes bloom with cyclamen-colored flora, while genetically-cultivated beast-stock roam the pleasure-gardens of the noble houses. The soil runs deep crimson like beet juice, rich with nutrients that feed carnivorous topiaries and venomous flowerbeds. Floating barber-surgeons in cream-colored air-gondolas drift between estates, offering grooming services while harvesting valuable toxins from the gardens below.
mood: Aristocratic elegance masking lethal toxicity; cultivated beauty that devours the unwary.
mechanicalIdentity: Poisoned + Vulnerable. Enemies weaken defenses and stack venom that amplifies damage taken. Elegant hunters expose weaknesses before the kill.

enemyBatches.name: fodder
enemyBatches.description: Low-level estate pests and garden vermin - swarming nuisances bred from common stock.

enemies.name: Cyclamen Mite
enemies.description: A fist-sized insectoid with translucent pink wing-cases, striped abdomen, and drooling mandibles that drip venom.

enemies.name: Custard Slug
enemies.description: A pale yellow gastropod the size of a housecat, leaving glistening toxic slime wherever it crawls.

enemies.name: Hedge Snipper
enemies.role: melee, low damage but inflicts vulnerable
enemies.description: A bio-engineered scissor-beetle with chrome-plated mandibles, bred to trim topiary but aggressive to intruders.

enemies.name: Beetling
enemies.description: A thumb-sized purple-black beetle that erupts from the crimson soil in swarms, their bites causing painful welts.

enemyBatches.name: standard
enemyBatches.description: Proper estate guardians and hunting beasts - the nobility's prized stock.

enemies.name: Topiary Stag
enemies.role: melee charger, applies vulnerable on charge
enemies.description: A majestic deer-shaped bush-creature with antlers of thorny branches, cyclamen blossoms blooming along its flanks.

enemies.name: Barber Surgeon
enemies.role: ranged support, inflicts poisoned with thrown razors
enemies.description: A tall figure in cream-colored coat and plague mask, wielding scalpels and throwing star-razors with surgical precision.

enemies.name: Taurus Hound
enemies.role: heavy melee, gore attack causes bleeding
enemies.description: A bull-headed mastiff the size of a pony, with striped brindle fur and custard-yellow eyes, bred for the hunt.

enemies.name: Venom Orchid
enemies.role: ranged caster, applies poisoned and slowed
enemies.description: A mobile flower-creature with cyclamen petals and a gaping maw, spitting acidic pollen clouds.

enemyBatches.name: elite
enemyBatches.description: Noble house champions and apex garden predators - trophies of the breeding houses.

enemies.name: Grand Horticulturist
enemies.role: caster summoner, buffs allies with nutrients
enemies.description: A robed figure wielding a staff of grafted branches, surrounded by swirling pollen that empowers nearby flora.

enemies.name: Crimson Mazer
enemies.role: heavy melee with pull effect using thorn-chains
enemies.description: A massive living topiary of beet-red leaves, humanoid-shaped, wielding extending vine-whips with hook-thorns.

enemies.name: Razorback Taurus
enemies.role: bruiser, charges and inflicts vulnerable + poisoned
enemies.description: A huge bull with chrome-plated horns striped in cream and crimson, foaming at the mouth with engineered toxins.

enemies.name: Cyclamen Matriarch
enemies.role: elite caster, large poison AoE and healing aura
enemies.description: A towering plant-creature with a skirt of blooming cyclamen flowers, constantly shedding toxic spores that heal allies.

enemyBatches.name: boss
enemyBatches.description: The legendary beasts of the breeding houses - living art pieces that have turned predator.

enemies.name: The Sanguine Groom
enemies.role: boss, dual-wield razor-staff, heavy poison and vulnerable stacking
enemies.description: A six-armed figure in immaculate cream barber's coat and crimson gloves, wielding three pairs of gleaming straight-razors with impossible grace.

enemies.name: Custard Duchess
enemies.role: boss, massive slug-queen, summons mites and leaves poison pools
enemies.description: A pale yellow gastropod the size of a mansion, crowned with cyclamen blossoms, her mucus trails becoming lakes of acid.

enemies.name: Beet Lord Tauron
enemies.role: boss, minotaur-like brute, charges and gores, inflicts all debuffs
enemies.description: A titanic bull-man with beet-purple hide striped in cream, wielding a pruning-hook the size of a tree, bellowing with earth-shaking force.

enemies.name: The Perfect Bloom
enemies.role: boss, true form hidden in cyclamen petals, psychic poison attacks
enemies.description: A massive floating flower-creature resembling an immense cyclamen, its center revealing rows of surgical teeth and a single vast eye.

items.name: Pruning Hook
items.description: A curved gardener's blade with a striped cream-and-crimson handle, designed for cutting thick branches.

items.name: Straight Razor
items.description: An elegant folding blade with a cyclamen-pink mother-of-pearl handle, wickedly sharp.

items.name: Gardener's Shears
items.description: A large pair of crossed blades resembling scissors, used for trimming topiary beasts.

items.name: Pollen Duster
items.description: A bellows-like device that launches clouds of toxic pollen at range.

items.name: Beetle Carapace Club
items.description: A mace fashioned from the purple shell of a giant beetle, surprisingly light and durable.

items.name: Barber's Strop
items.description: A leather strap weighted with razor-edged buckles, wielded like a whip-sword.

items.name: Grafting Rod
items.description: A staff of living wood with multiple branches, each tipped with a different venomous thorn.

items.name: Horn Caster
items.description: A bow carved from the striped horn of a Taurus beast, its arrows whistle like hunting calls.

items.name: Coiffure Shield
items.description: A round shield painted with cream-and-crimson barber-pole stripes, light and well-balanced.

items.name: Topiary Guard
items.description: A living shield of woven branches with blooming cyclamen, its thorns drip with mild venom.

items.name: Cyclamen Corsage
items.description: A wrist-mounted flower that pulses with protective spores, granting resistance to poison.

items.name: Barber's Charm
items.description: A small silver scissors pendant on a chain, said to cut through curses and toxins alike.

items.name: Custard Pearl
items.description: A creamy yellow gem that absorbs venom and converts it to healing energy.

items.name: Beetroot Extract
items.description: A flask of thick crimson liquid that stains the teeth but grants temporary vitality.

items.name: Pomade of Clarity
items.description: A cream-colored ointment that clears the mind and grants immunity to confusion effects.

items.name: Venom Sample
items.description: A vial of concentrated estate toxin that can be applied to weapons for devastating effect.
